text.title: Product Explainability (PM Angle) Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema draft-07 for the spec artefact this methodology produces, with valid and invalid examples plus forbidden patterns.

example.note: problem too short; who too short; behaviour_change is feature-shipped not behaviour; outcome_metric missing baseline/target; evidence_link empty; renders missing 4 audiences.

list.item: audience_renders missing any of {exec, sales, support, customer}.
behaviour_change phrased as feature-shipped ('we added X').
ninety_second_test_passed=false with rendered audiences (renders fired without canonical passing).
